nodes.title: Core Node Test Guide
widgets_values:
## EasyUse Anima Core Node Test

This sample checks the text flow of Prompt Corrector, LoRA Preset, and Prompt Studio Advanced without loading generation models.

- Queue with the sample prompt in Prompt Corrector to preview the corrected prompt and report on the right.
- Prompt Studio receives the Corrector output as general tags and splits positive, negative, metadata, and Mod Guidance quality outputs.
- LoRA Preset FIX works by matching filenames. The sample LoRA row is disabled by default, so queueing does not fail when the file is missing.

The `Show Text` nodes on the right are result previews. They update after queue execution.
